Package trienodes

Class UkkonenTrieNode

java.lang.Object
trienodes.ACTrieNode
trienodes.UkkonenTrieNode
public class UkkonenTrieNode
extends ACTrieNode
UkkonenTrieNode is a subclass of ACTrieNode which adds functionality (depth, supporters, bfsSuccessor) to the superclass in order to enable the use of Ukkonens Algorithm.
Since:
26.12.2020, Sa.
Author:
Markus Walder

  • Field Details

    • depth

      public int depth

    • supportedKeys

      public java.util.List<java.lang.Integer> supportedKeys

    • bfsSuccessor

      public UkkonenTrieNode bfsSuccessor

    • pCandidate

      public java.util.LinkedList<java.lang.Integer> pCandidate
      pCandidate represents all strings with a suffix overlapping with the prefix of this node's substring with which we can still merge.

      Therefore, pCandidate contains all indices i, such that this node is on the Failure path starting from the node representing the end of string i. We still need to check for each node in pCandidate whether the hamilton path already contains an overlap (xi, xj) for any j during construction. If it doesn't, it means that this node can form an overlap with string i.

  • Constructor Details

    • UkkonenTrieNode

      protected UkkonenTrieNode​(LanguageParameter parameters, boolean isEndOfWord, char pch)

  • Method Details

    • getNextNode

      public UkkonenTrieNode getNextNode​(char input)
      Returns the next node in the Aho-Corasick String Matcher Trie, note that this is different to getDFATransition. It will return null, if there is no node reachable using input. This function does not handle any transitions to the failure node.
      Overrides:
      getNextNode in class ACTrieNode
      Parameters:
      input - Character used to determine next node
      Returns:
      UkkonenTrieNode the node reachable using input or null if there is no reachable node

    • setNextNode

      public void setNextNode​(char input, UkkonenTrieNode node)

    • iterator

      public java.util.Iterator<UkkonenTrieNode> iterator()
      Returns an iterator over all successor nodes casted to UkkonenTrieNodes.
      Returns:
      Iterator[UkkonenTrieNodes] over all successors of this node

    • getFail

      public UkkonenTrieNode getFail()
      Gets the first node on the failure path starting from this node. This node is the node representing the longest prefix string matching the suffix of the string represented by our current node.
      Overrides:
      getFail in class ACTrieNode
      Returns:
      UkkonenTrieNode the fail node
